title: Two Iran-linked Ships Passed Through Strait of Hormuz Ahead of U.S. Blockade
summary_full: The vessels exited the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, hours before a U.S. naval blockade took effect.
summary_public: The vessels exited the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, hours before a U.S. naval blockade took effect.
